zh.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv是Bengt Gotskalksson和Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke的兒子，出生。他於1450年與Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv是Bengt Gotskalksson和Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke的儿子，出生。他于1450年与Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Bengtsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Gunnel, Kerstin, Lars, Per, Sven.  German Hans, Ulrika.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Bengt, Swedish form of Benedict . Compare Bankston , Benson , and Bentson .

variants.name: Bengtson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nils, Algot, Britt, Kjersten, Lars, Nels.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Bengtsson . In some cases this is also an Americanized form of the rare Danish and Norwegian cognate Bengtsen.

variants.name: Bankston
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankson  .
History: Andrew Bankston, alias Anders Bengtsson, came to New Sweden on the Delaware river in 1656; he died in Philadelphia, PA, in 1706.

variants.name: Bengston
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Nels, Nils.
Altered (metathesized) form of Swedish   Bengtsson  .

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bankson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankston  .

nameMeanings.name: Arend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Arensberg
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Aardema
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Frans, Klaas.
West Frisian and Dutch:
patronymic, formed with the Frisian suffix -ma ‘(one of the) men of’, from the personal name Aard (a variant of Arend ).

variants.name: Arends
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from the personal name Arend , inflected with genitive -s.

variants.name: Arendt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Armin, Dieter, Gunter, Hans, Hedwig, Monika, Wolfram.
German: variant of   Arend   and   Arndt  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of the German personal name as a surname, in part probably on account of its resemblance to the Jewish name   Aaron  . Compare   Ahrens  .

variants.name: Arensdorf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Amie, Patrice.
Altered form of German Ahrensdorf: habitational name from a place called Ahrensdorf, ‘village of Ahrens’ (see Arend and Dorf ). There are several places called Ahrensdorf north and south of Berlin.
Luxembourgish: cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv was born as the son of Bengt Gotskalksson and Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. He married Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag in 1450. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1471.

fr.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv est né, fils de Bengt Gotskalksson et Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. Il a épousé Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1471.

de.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv wurde, als Sohn von Bengt Gotskalksson und Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke geboren. Er hat 1450 Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1471.

it.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv è nato il come figlio di Bengt Gotskalksson e Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. Lui sposato Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag nel 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1471.

ja.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulvはBengt GotskalkssonとBirgitta Arendsdotter Stykeの息子として生まれた。1450年にBrita Bengtsdotter Natt och dagと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv(은)는 Bengt Gotskalksson(와)과 Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1450년 Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv nasceu filho de Bengt Gotskalksson e Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. Ele casou-se com Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag em 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1471.

ru.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv родился. Его родителей звали Bengt Gotskalksson и Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. Он женился на женщине по имени Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag в 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1471 г.

es.lifeSummary: Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv nació como hijo de Bengt Gotskalksson y Birgitta Arendsdotter Styke. Se casó con Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag en 1450. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1471.
